summary: Spec review approved for GH-104 implementation head c3e7b00887310ce5047c12a28ac67011208b500c. The formal spec is a minimal suite for Core-only Harbor public runtime/evidence refs binding and explicitly excludes result envelopes, API query/App integration, Harbor SDK/runtime calls, raw evidence bodies, and true writes.
